title: Polydeukes config
description: Schema v2 (config as data) — equivalent to the runtime defineConfig() validator; the equivalence is enforced by a contract test.

languages.description: Language axis, first-class. Keys are user values ('typescript', 'python', ...).

protectedPaths.description: Raw protected path patterns — normalization happens at resolve time.

adapters.description: Adapter directories — auto-included into the protection surface.

disciplines.description: User-declared disciplines — validated data the covenant package compiles. Fully identical entries are copy-paste duplicates (by-id uniqueness is enforced by the runtime validator).

productionGlob.description: What counts as production source for this language.

testCmd.description: Shell command template that verifies the given scope — every literal {scope} token is substituted at resolve time.

logPath.description: Telemetry log path. Defaults to .polydeukes/roi.log when omitted.

disciplineId.description: Unique handle — telemetry label and verdict reason prefix.

disciplineWhy.description: Prose rationale, documentation only — never judged.

discipline.description: One discipline entry — exactly one predicate family (forbid | immutable | forbidCommand); in/except scope the forbid family only.

forbid.description: Delta family — string shorthand is equivalent to { added }.

immutable.description: Path family — its own glob is the scope.

forbidCommand.description: Command family — regex over shell command strings.
